name: Healthy Corner
tagline: Alpski zdraviliški kamp — Alpine Wellness Retreat
description: Full-stack wellness retreat website with CMS, media manager, e-commerce product catalog, shopping cart, order management, multi-language support, and a comprehensive booking system for classes and wellness programs.

description: Elegant hospitality website for a nature retreat and event venue. Features brand-aligned purple design, smooth Framer Motion animations, booking system, multi-language support, and beautiful image galleries.

name: Kmetija Maroša
tagline: Najboljše iz narave, dostavljeno na vaš prag
description: Premium farm-to-table e-commerce platform with full Supabase backend, Stripe payments, multi-language support via i18next, QR code generation, gift product system, newsletter with Netlify Edge Functions, and comprehensive Playwright E2E test coverage.

name: ORI 369 Terapevtski Center
description: Complete enhanced clone of ori369.com with real-time booking system, Supabase Auth, admin dashboard with role-based access, Google Calendar sync, 40+ Playwright E2E tests, and full e-commerce capabilities.

name: Infinity Role Teachers
description: Full-stack educational platform with Stripe payments, TipTap rich text editor, Shadcn UI, multi-language support, dark/light theme, Embla Carousel, React Day Picker scheduling, email notifications via Resend, and role-based access for students, teachers, and admins.

name: LTE Apartments
description: Modern rental property showcase and booking platform with multiple design variants, mobile-responsive layout, React Router navigation, and Vite single-file build for easy deployment.

name: Jaytee AI Call Center
description: Intelligent AI call center solution with ElevenLabs voice integration for automated customer support. Features real-time voice conversation, intent detection, and seamless handoff protocols.

name: Jaytee Biosciences Chatbot
description: Domain-specific AI chatbot for biosciences company with knowledge base integration, natural language understanding, and professional conversational interface.

name: MVCP — International Human Rights Platform
description: Interactive educational website for FDV Ljubljana students studying international human rights law. Features a D3.js force-directed systems map, interactive timeline from 1215 to present, treaties explorer, 150+ question quiz, and global search.

name: Univerzalni Periodični Pregled — UPR Platform
tagline: UN Human Rights Review — FDV Educational Tool
description: Interactive educational platform covering the UN Universal Periodic Review process, built for FDV Ljubljana students. Clean, modern interface with structured content and visual learning aids.

name: PPOS — Politika, Pravo, Oboroženi Spopadi
description: Interactive educational platform covering politics, law, and armed conflicts for FDV Ljubljana. Features visual mind maps, comprehensive study guides, and interactive exercises on international humanitarian law.

name: Russian Language Learning Platform
description: Interactive Russian language learning platform for FDV students with ElevenLabs voice integration for pronunciation, Supabase data management, NextAuth authentication, and Framer Motion animations.

name: MVZET Veterinar
description: Modern veterinary clinic website with professional design, service showcase, appointment booking, and clinic information. Clean, trustworthy aesthetic tailored for animal health professionals.

name: Apartma Pohorč
description: Mountain apartment rental website with booking calendar, admin panel, multi-language search, and visual gallery. Designed for a Slovenian alpine accommodation provider.

name: The Green Beautiful
description: Elegant wellness and beauty brand website with premium design aesthetic, service showcase, and online booking capabilities.

name: Awaken Your UNIQ Self
description: Premium personal development and transformation platform with Next.js 15, Supabase backend, Framer Motion animations, Zustand state management, and comprehensive content management for wellness programs.

name: H2O Team
description: Bilingual e-commerce website for freediving and spearfishing school with full product catalog (259KB products), shopping cart, course listings, blog, events calendar, and ocean-inspired design system.

name: FlowGen Turbines
description: Modern corporate website redesign for a hydropower solutions company, targeting investors and customers with dynamic animations, interactive elements, and dedicated investor section.

name: Glosare SRL
description: Transformed an outdated website into a modern responsive site with improved navigation, 3D product demonstrations, product showcase with categories, and optimized fast-loading pages.

name: ORI369 Group Landing Page
description: Premium landing page showcasing three unique brands under the ORI369 hospitality group: ORI 369 Glamping (Teal), Healthy Corner Wellness (Lime), and HEAVEN Resort (Purple). Advanced Framer Motion, multi-language, embedded map.

name: Watersports Booking Platform
description: Activity booking platform for wakeboarding, waterskiing, tube towing, banana boat, and jet skiing. Seasonal operation (June–September), real-time data management, Supabase Auth, and admin panel.

name: Tentart Event Tents
description: 5-language international event tent company website with Three.js 3D tent configurator, animated product showcase, custom inquiry system, and Framer Motion scroll animations. Deployed on Vercel.

name: Plesni Studio S
description: Modern full-stack dance studio website with React, online class booking, schedule with filtering, student portal, WhatsApp integration, event calendar, gallery with lightbox, and multi-language support for Plesni Studio S in Maribor.

name: Global Case Law Search Engine
description: Comprehensive search engine aggregating judicial decisions from 100+ case law databases worldwide (WorldLII, INCADAT, HUDOC/ECtHR). Features unified search, advanced filtering, analytics dashboard, Hague Convention analysis, and PDF/CSV export.
features: Advanced filtering: jurisdiction, date, court level

name: UPR Document Intelligence System
tagline: AI-Powered UN Human Rights Document Analysis
description: Web application for downloading, analyzing, and visualizing all UN Universal Periodic Review documents. Semantic search with pgvector, 40,000+ recommendations extracted across 193 countries, citation generation, and interactive world maps.
features: Interactive world maps and network graphs

name: Scientific Article Research Agent
description: Multi-agent AI system for automated scientific literature search and synthesis. Six specialized agents handle document ingestion, research planning, literature retrieval, article synthesis, fact verification, and citation management.

name: Real Data Research Agent (Zero Fake Data)
tagline: ZERO TOLERANCE FOR FAKE DATA Research System
description: Advanced scientific research agent with strict zero-tolerance policy for fabricated data. Integrates PubMed, arXiv, ClinicalTrials.gov, Google Scholar, Tavily, and Serper. Supports Gemini, OpenAI, and Anthropic LLMs.

name: Modular Voice-to-Voice AI Sandbox
description: Cutting-edge modular voice sandbox running entirely in the browser. Swap STT, LLM, and TTS engines independently. Uses Transformers.js for in-browser ML inference, ONNX Runtime, WebGPU acceleration, and Groq API for ultra-fast LLM.

name: Qwen3-ASR-0.6B Speech Recognition
description: Complete web-based implementation of Qwen3-ASR-0.6B supporting 52 languages and dialects including 22 Chinese regional dialects. Three interface modes: Gradio GUI, FastAPI real-time streaming, and CLI batch processor.

name: Supertonic-2 Web UI
description: Browser-native TTS interface using Supertonic-2 ONNX model. 11 preset voices, 5 languages, 167× faster than real-time, complete privacy with zero server calls, adjustable speed/quality/backend, WAV download.

name: Granite Speech Real-Time Translator
description: Real-time speech translation and transcription system powered by IBM Granite 4.0 Speech model. Supports multi-language transcription with speaker identification and live translation output.

name: German Speech Transcription System
tagline: High-Accuracy German ASR with Speaker Diarization
description: High-accuracy German speech transcription system using OpenAI Whisper with pyannote.audio for speaker diarization. Identifies who said what and when with timestamp-aligned transcription.

name: ARIS — Autonomous Research in Sleep
description: Autonomous research system with 31+ skill modules running overnight. Built on Markdown-defined skills with Claude Code, Codex MCP, Python, and multi-model collaboration for continuous research output.

name: Polaris Research System
description: Multi-agent research orchestration system using OpenRouter API and CrossRef for verified source synthesis. Agents work in parallel to gather, verify, and synthesize research from academic sources.

name: Emotional Email Response Framework
description: Sophisticated multi-agent system for analyzing and responding to emotional emails using 4 specialized AI agents: Clinical Psychologist, Female Psychologist, Author Wisdom (Greene/Brown/Goleman), and Strategic Synthesizer. Uses Google Gemini 2.5.

name: Sabina Coach AI
tagline: Professional AI Coaching with Real-Time Voice
description: Professional AI coaching interface with ElevenLabs SDK real-time voice conversation, large professional knowledge base, and HTTPS Python server. Testing interface for production-ready coaching deployment.

name: Bybit Copytrading Bot
description: Production-ready Bybit copytrading bot with dual-mode operation: automated browser control via Playwright and direct API v5 + WebSocket. Full risk management, position tracking, P&L monitoring, drawdown protection, and auto-reconnection.

name: Invoice OCR Processor
description: FastAPI application using PaddleOCR and Vision Language Models (Qwen2-VL, LLaVA via Vast.ai) to extract structured data from invoice images and PDFs. Exports to DATEV, QuickBooks, and Xero formats.

name: Vote Load Tester
description: High-volume load testing tool for email-based voting systems using multiple email service providers (tempmail, inboxes, EmailJS). Features parallel voting, proxy rotation, detailed statistics, and Sunday call highlighting.

name: Telegram Call Data Extractor
description: Python script that extracts call information from Telegram HTML exports and converts to structured CSV. Analyzed 105 calls with breakdown by type, status, caller, and total talk time. Uses regex for robust HTML parsing.

name: Aurena.at Auction Scraper
description: Selenium-based scraper for aurena.at auction pages with dual extraction methods (JavaScript + DOM parsing), robust CSS selector detection, data validation, and JSON output.

name: Cannabis Patent Analysis System
description: Comprehensive cannabis/cannabinoid patent extraction and analysis system producing a 156KB master index, 33.9MB full patent texts, and 8.1MB abstracts database. Includes CBN cocrystallization analysis and extraction evolution study.

name: MVCP 2026 Web Platform
tagline: React 19 + Vite 7 — Single-File Human Rights App
description: Modern React 19 + Vite 7 rebuild of the MVCP Human Rights educational platform. Single-file build for easy distribution via vite-plugin-singlefile, TailwindCSS v4, and updated 2026 curriculum content.

name: PDF Editor Pro
tagline: Browser-Based PDF Editing with AI Assistance
description: Browser-based PDF editor with canvas editing via Fabric.js, PDF manipulation with pdf-lib, drag-and-drop upload, Zustand state management, page navigation, and annotation tools.

name: PPOS Study System
description: Visual study system for International Humanitarian Law with Markmap mind maps, master study guide, IHL cases reference, Customary IHL quick reference, and AI-generated assessment examples.

name: SITIS.si Knowledge Base Builder
tagline: AI-Powered Q&A Knowledge Base from Web Content
description: Python scraper and ElevenLabs-powered system that builds a structured Q&A knowledge base from web content. Processes pages from sitis.si and generates voice-ready knowledge base for conversational AI agents.

name: Green Spirit AI Chatbot
description: Real-time voice agent combining ElevenLabs Conversational AI with Abacus.ai intelligent chatbot. Features URL display, intent detection, seamless voice+text switching, and Node.js WebSocket backend.

name: Slovenian Ski Association Analysis
description: Comprehensive data-driven analysis of SZS (Slovenian Ski Association) efficiency 2015–2025, examining organizational efficiency, athlete development pipelines, competitive results, and financial efficiency against peer nations.

name: AMS4EVER AG
description: Modern professional website for a Swiss professional services company featuring animated hero statistics, services showcase, team profiles, and AOS scroll animations. WCAG accessibility compliant with structured data SEO.

name: Sara Choi & Eunmi Eo — Road to Gold 2026
description: Paralympic athlete website for visually impaired para-alpine skier Sara Choi and sighted guide Eunmi Eo. Countdown to 2026 Milano Cortina Paralympics, sponsorship opportunities, athlete profiles, and WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility compliance with Korean flag color palette.

name: Anonymous Swiss Family Office Platform
description: Multi-page professional website for a Swiss family office and wealth management company. Pages cover services, personal advice, family office services, location, and contact with smooth animations throughout. Client requested anonymity.

name: UPR Slovenia — Government Data Dashboard
description: Interactive PWA dashboard for UPR Slovenia with service worker for offline capability, D3.js data visualizations, manifest-based installation, caching strategy, and Netlify deployment.

name: Bentral — Real Estate Platform
tagline: Multi-version Real Estate Platform · React 19 + Vite
description: Multi-version real estate platform built with React 19, Vite, and TailwindCSS v4. Includes multiple design variants (big-open, high-q, lte-high), React Router v7 navigation, single-file build via vite-plugin-singlefile, and mobile-responsive improvements across versions.

name: Legal Research Agents
tagline: EU Case Law · EUR-Lex · Multi-agent AI
description: Multi-agent AI system for EU legal research using CrewAI. Integrates EUR-Lex API for European legal documents, Slovenian case law processing, and enhanced research logging. Includes test suite for EU case research and EUR-Lex access validation.

name: Slovenian TTS Platform
tagline: 3 Native Slovenian Voices · Piper + Coqui + FastAPI
description: Production-ready Slovenian TTS platform with 3 working voices: Artur (Piper TTS), Common Voice (Coqui TTS), and Piper E2 Enhanced. REST API for synthesis, speed control (0.5×–2.0×), multiple output formats, and PDF document reading with TTS output. 9/9 tests passed.
features: 3 Slovenian voices (Artur, Common Voice, Piper E2)

name: Slovenian Primary School Exam Processor
description: 5-agent AI pipeline for processing Slovenian primary school exams. Agents handle image extraction (OCR + handwriting recognition), subject analysis and performance evaluation, new exam generation, print formatting (student + teacher PDF versions), and quality validation. Supports 8 subjects across grades 1–9.

name: Legal Anonymizer
description: Offline-first document anonymizer for PDF and DOCX files with Slovenian and German language support. Features automatic language detection, encrypted reversible mapping, CLI and FastAPI web UI, project-based organization with UUID tracking, and OCR integration for scanned documents.

name: YouTube Transcript Extractor
tagline: Full Channel Extraction · SL/EN · Speaker ID
description: Complete YouTube channel transcript extraction tool with speaker identification from video titles and descriptions. Language preference: Slovenian → English → Auto-generated. Organized output by speaker category with comprehensive logging (CSV, JSON, text) and rate limiting awareness.

name: IPE Study System
description: Comprehensive study system for International Protection of the Environment at FDV Ljubljana. Visual Markmap mind maps, master study guide, topic-specific maps for Politics/Law/EU Policy/Case Studies, exam questions mapped to concepts, flashcards, and evidence-based study plan using 5 cognitive science techniques.
features: Topic maps: Politics, Law, EU Policy, Case Studies

name: Slovenščina za 6. razred
description: Interactive educational game for 6th grade Slovenian language curriculum. Six learning modules covering verbs, personal pronouns, numerals, indirect speech, writing assessment, and folk custom description. Each module includes learning content, exercises, and a quiz. Progress tracked via localStorage, deployed on Netlify.

name: Institut za Pravice Otroka
description: Educational website for the Institute for Children's Rights at FDV Ljubljana. Features information about children's rights, legal resources, educational materials, and advocacy tools for child protection.

name: OŠ Šola 6
description: Modern primary school website with information about programs, events, staff, and student resources. Clean design optimized for parents and students.
